title: Service Chiefs
description: Opportunities for military officers and government civilians to inform the battlefield technologies of tomorrow. Get a crash course in innovation.
text:
The Service Chiefs Fellowship Program allows outstanding service members to immerse themselves in our world of innovative science and technology research.
Participants gain an understanding of DARPAâs mission and our unique approach to ensuring the U.S. maintains the advantage of technological surprise. They also get to delve into specific areas of scientific interest to them and their respective service branch.
For active-duty participants, the fellowship lasts 12 weeks.
After completing the program, Fellows serve as informal liaisons, bolstering the vital link between DARPA technology and the battlefield of tomorrow.

Take the First Step
For interested candidates, the path to becoming a Service Chiefs Fellow begins within your branch:
Air Force: Log on to MyFSS and access the Active Duty: Personnel Services Delivery Memorandums (PSDM) home page
Army: Refer to the Army Human Resources Command Broadening Opportunities Program
Marine Corps: See the semi-annual MARADMIN
Navy: Contact your Navy detailer at Navy Personnel Command working with the PERS-440 Branch Head
Space Force: Contact the Enterprise Talent Management Office
Hear from Former Fellows
Former Service Chiefs Fellows share their unique insights and perspectives from their experiences at DARPA.
View the full playlist by clicking the icon in the top right corner of this video.
Calling all SCFP Alumni
If you are an alum of the DARPA Service Chiefs Fellowship Program and want to stay connected to DARPA and your fellow SCFP alumni, reach out to SCPAlumni@darpa.mil and provide your contact information. We will get back to you with details on how to sign up to receive the SCFP Alumni Newsletter and stay up to date on SCFP alumni news and events such as alumni reunions.
Note: This is not an information collection, and participation is voluntary. Providing your contact information means you consent to its sharing and use for the purposes stated. This announcement applies to Service Chiefs Fellowship Program Alumni only.
